name: @aily-project/lib-unihiker-k10-camera-ai
author: DFRobot
description: UNIHIKER K10摄像头与AI识别库，支持拍照、人脸检测/识别、猫狗检测、运动检测、二维码扫描
description_zh_cn: UNIHIKER K10摄像头与AI识别库，支持拍照、人脸检测/识别、猫狗检测、运动检测、二维码扫描
description_en: UNIHIKER K10 camera and AI recognition library, supports photo, face detection/recognition, pet detection, motion detection, QR code scanning
